hero.title: Secure Digital Voting for All Organizations
hero.subtitle: The global voting platform for NGOs, diaspora communities, and associations
hero.description: Conduct fair and transparent elections with our GDPR-compliant, end-to-end encrypted voting system. Trusted by thousands of organizations, associations, and diaspora communities across 100+ countries.

ngo_features.title: Purpose-Built for Global Organizations
ngo_features.subtitle: From NGOs to diaspora communities -- PUBLIC DIGIT handles secure elections for organizations of all sizes worldwide.

cards.title: For NGOs & Associations
cards.description: Organizations worldwide conduct secure member elections with full transparency, real-time results, and complete audit trails for organizational accountability.

cards.title: For Global Diaspora Communities
cards.description: Nepali diaspora associations, alumni networks, and professional societies across borders conduct elections with geographic flexibility and secure international voting.
features: Global voter participation from any country

cards.title: For Cultural & Professional Organizations
cards.description: Cultural associations, educational institutions, and professional networks streamline their election processes with intuitive interfaces and comprehensive audit trails.

how_it_works.title: How It Works
how_it_works.subtitle: From setup to results -- four simple steps.

steps.title: Create Your Organization
steps.description: Register and set up your organization profile. Add your logo, branding, and team members in minutes.

steps.title: Design Your Election
steps.description: Create ballots, set deadlines, and configure voting rules. Choose single-choice, ranked, or multi-seat formats.

steps.title: Invite Your Voters
steps.description: Upload your voter list or add members manually. Each voter receives a unique, secure access code via email.

steps.title: View Live Results
steps.description: Monitor participation in real time. Once voting closes, results and a full audit report are available instantly.

cards.title: GDPR Compliance
cards.description: Built from the ground up to satisfy GDPR Article 32 requirements. Data minimization, lawful basis documentation, and a full data processing register are included.

cards.title: German Data Hosting
cards.description: Servers exclusively located in Germany. Meets DSGVO requirements and German data sovereignty standards.

cards.title: ISO 27001 Certified
cards.description: Industry-standard information security management. Regular third-party audits ensure continuous compliance.

cards.title: End-to-End Encryption
cards.description: Military-grade encryption for all votes. Votes are encrypted on voter devices and remain encrypted until counted.

testimonials.title: Trusted by Leading Organizations Worldwide
testimonials.subtitle: Here is what organizational leaders and diaspora communities say about PUBLIC DIGIT.

items.quote: PUBLIC DIGIT made it incredibly easy to conduct our international member election with participants spread across 12 countries. The transparency and security gave our members complete confidence in the process.
items.author: Maria Santos

items.quote: As a diaspora organization, we needed a voting platform that could handle international participation in multiple languages. PUBLIC DIGIT delivered exactly that with ease and reliability.
items.author: Ahmed Hassan

items.quote: The GDPR compliance and security features gave our board complete peace of mind. Setting up and running elections for thousands of members across time zones was seamless.
items.author: Prof. Elena Rodriguez
